content.text:
[cron:da4546e3-8bdd-4291-b88f-472a4b5d4b34 盘前-MyQuant选股] 执行盘前 MyQuant 选股：
1. 先检查今天是否交易日（2026年休市日：20260101 20260102 20260216-20260220 20260223 20260406 20260501 20260504 20260505 20260619 20260925 20261001-20261007），休市则输出"休市"结束
2. 运行: cd /Users/lynch/Codes/MyQuant && nohup /opt/miniconda3/envs/MyQuant/bin/python -m myquant preopen > /tmp/preopen_$(date +%Y%m%d).log 2>&1 &
3. 等待完成（约30秒），检查 outputs/preopen/YYYYMMDD/ 下 top_y5.csv 是否存在
4. 如果成功，输出"preopen 完成，候选池 N 只"；如果失败，输出错误信息
Current time: Monday, April 13th, 2026 — 08:00 (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-04-13 00:00 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
